---
title: Animals, Robots, Gods
author: Webb Keane
date: '2025-11-07'
categories:
- Social Science
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★ | Adventures in the Moral Imagination
rating: 2
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# Animals, Robots, Gods

## Reading Journey

- 2025-11-07: Started
- 2025-12-03: 192
- 2025-12-03: Finished
